title: Part Time Demo Chef
description:
Location: Gain City Megastore and main showrooms

Work Days: Weekends and Public Holidays only

Job Overview

We are looking for an enthusiastic and engaging Part-Time Demo Chef to conduct live cooking demonstrations at Gain City’s main showrooms. The ideal candidate should be passionate about food, confident in presenting to the public, and capable of showcasing kitchen appliances in a lively, informative, and customer-friendly manner.

Key Responsibilities

  • Conduct engaging cooking demonstrations to highlight the features and benefits of Gain City’s kitchen appliances (e.g. ovens, air fryers, induction hobs, and small kitchen appliances).
  • Interact with shoppers to create interest and drive sales conversion.
  • Ensure all ingredients, tools, and equipment are properly prepared and maintained before and after each session.
  • Work closely with the showroom and F&B team to support promotional events and campaigns.
  • Maintain cleanliness and adhere to food safety and hygiene standards.
  • Provide basic appliance usage tips and after-use care advice to customers.

Requirements

  • Prior experience in culinary, food demonstration, or F&B service preferred.
  • Outgoing personality with strong communication and presentation skills.
  • Ability to work independently and handle live audience interactions confidently.
  • Available to work weekends and public holidays. 3 time slots per day, 12-2pm, 3-5pm, and 6-8pm. Reporting at Siungei Kadut Gain City kitchen at 10.30am for preparation.
  • Basic knowledge of kitchen appliances and home cooking trends is an advantage.
  • Must possess a valid Food and Hygiene certification

postedCompany.description:
GAIN CITY BEST-ELECTRIC PTE LTD

Looking for a challenging and rewarding career in a fast paced organization? Join Gain City!


Established in 1981, Gain City is one of Singapore‘s leading retail brand carrying a wide range of quality air-conditioners, home appliances, audio visual equipment, digital and IT products. It is a multi-faceted organisation with distinctive track records in retail and wholesales operations, manufacturing, maintenance and repair, commercial, industrial and residential projects, import and export.
 

Gain City the leading home-grown appliances and electronic retail store is also proud to be the recipient of the prestigious Enterprise 50 Award (5 times), Singapore Prestige Brand Award 2011 (Winner, SPBA-Heritage Brand). Gain City has also previously awarded other celebrated award such as the ISO 9001-2000 Certification, Super Brand (2004,2005,2006,2008 & 2009) and Singapore Promising Brand Award (2006).
